subject: english
learning_objectives: Identify the major past-tense forms in the lesson
Explain how each form is constructed
Use the forms correctly in examples

sections.heading: Forms Covered
sections.content: The note covers simple past, past continuous, past perfect, and past perfect continuous.

sections.heading: Examples and Uses
sections.content:
Simple past may be regular or irregular: Ume worked. We ate late last night.
Past continuous uses was/were plus -ing: I was drinking. We were drinking.
Past perfect uses had to show an earlier completed action: They had finished the work before the teacher arrived.
Past perfect continuous shows ongoing activity before a past point: She had been working.
